summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 candidate PRs. No GitHub mutations, merges, closures, labels, comments, or fix PRs are planned. Security-sensitive refs are routed to central security handling; already-closed PRs are kept closed; remaining open non-security PRs are retained for maintainer/product review as independent or related work.
